name: feedback-analyzer-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Analyze customer feedback for sentiment, themes, and actionable insights.

tools.name: analyze_feedback
tools.description: Analyze customer feedback for sentiment breakdown with per-item scores.

tools.name: extract_themes
tools.description: Extract recurring themes from feedback using keyword matching.

tools.name: sentiment_trend
tools.description: Compute sentiment trend over time. Each item needs 'text' and 'date' (YYYY-MM-DD) keys.

tools.name: generate_summary
tools.description: Generate an executive summary of feedback with key takeaways and recommendations.
